steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to contrast the number of haiku in each poem — specifically 15 versus 7. The correct choice must state both numbers and signal the difference between them.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — '"15 haiku" consists of fifteen haiku, whereas "7 haiku" consists of seven.': states both counts explicitly and uses whereas to mark the contrast between them. ✓
  • Choice B — 'Both poems can be found in Sanchez’s 2010 collection.': says nothing about how many haiku are in either poem; contrasts nothing. ✗
  • Choice C — '"15 haiku" is about Toni Morrison, "7 haiku" is about Ray Brown.': contrasts the subjects of the poems, not the number of haiku. ✗
  • Choice D — 'The poems celebrate or mourn revered African American figures.': describes the collection’s overall theme; gives no count for either poem. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
